tasks.title: Replace the active local/user-level benchmark with the note-aligned selective package
tasks.next_action: Keep the new active local/user-level pointer on user-level selective v1 and treat the older excerpt surface v1.1 line as historical / superseded evidence only. The landed builder and runner now live at reading-companion-backend/eval/attentional_v2/user_level_selective_v1.py and run_user_level_selective_comparison.py. The active package truth is now 5 reading segments and 202 note cases after rebuilding the package with a stricter body-start rule: reading segments start at the first real body unit rather than the absolute beginning of the source file, front matter such as disclaimers, recommendation / preface material, book-about-book notes, timeline pages, and part/chapter stubs is skipped, and nawaer_baodian_private_zh now uses a benchmark-local body-start override at c13 (认识财富创造的原理) so its old preface-side c6 note no longer participates in the active package. Every active note case still carries segment_source_v1 char-span slices, and Selective Legibility candidate retrieval must use strict source-span overlap rather than string or semantic similarity. Broad semantic-segment fallback spans remain judge-only candidates and never auto-count as exact note recall. A repaired sibling package is still staged at reading-companion-backend/state/eval_local_datasets/user_level_benchmarks/attentional_v2_user_level_selective_v1_repaired_20260416 with a matching audit export, and the known truncated example huochu_shengming_de_yiyi_private_zh_personal_notes__e0002 maps to the full two-sentence source span there. Keep the repaired rerun as the current formal evaluation lane while the strict source-span jobs and preserved failed evidence remain available for diagnosis.

The current mechanism-eval action is comparative audit and diagnosis: use the new cross-run audit set to compare attentional_v2_post_phase_d_excerpt_regression_20260413 against attentional_v2_excerpt_surface_v1_1_judged_20260406, and attentional_v2_post_phase_d_longspan_judged_20260413 against attentional_v2_accumulation_benchmark_v1_judged_rerun_20260407, with iterator_v1 kept as the reused formal baseline. Read winner movement together with the hard evidence-density signal that post-Phase-D attentional_v2 matched reactions collapsed from 7.0 to 1.0 on excerpt and from 19.71 to 2.29 on long-span. Only reopen isolated prompt/response replay if another spare MiniMax-M2.7-capable key becomes available.
